task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Fisher Scientific' supplier.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Suppliers list or detail view, look for 'Fisher Scientific' with Address '300 Industry Drive, Pittsburgh, PA 15275', Email 'procurement@fishersci.com', and Phone '1-800-766-7000'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the manufacturer and asset category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Keysight Technologies' in the Manufacturers list and 'Lab Instruments' in the Categories list within the Snipe-IT interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the two asset models.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Asset Models list, look for 'DSOX1204G Oscilloscope' (Model No: DSOX1204G) and '34465A Digital Multimeter' (Model No: 34465A). Both should be associated with the 'Keysight Technologies' manufacturer and 'Lab Instruments' category.

task_completion.description: Verify the registration of the two oscilloscope assets (LAB-0001 and LAB-0002).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Assets list, look for asset tags LAB-0001 and LAB-0002. They must be 'DSOX1204G Oscilloscope' models, have status 'Ready to Deploy', location 'Engineering Lab 204', supplier 'Fisher Scientific', Order Number 'PO-2025-0142', and serial numbers MY61001234 and MY61001235 respectively. Purchase date (2025-01-15), cost ($1899.00), and warranty (36 months) should be visible in their details.

task_completion.description: Verify the registration of the two digital multimeter assets (LAB-0003 and LAB-0004).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Assets list, look for asset tags LAB-0003 and LAB-0004. They must be '34465A Digital Multimeter' models, have status 'Ready to Deploy', location 'Engineering Lab 204', supplier 'Fisher Scientific', Order Number 'PO-2025-0142', and serial numbers MY56007891 and MY56007892 respectively. Purchase date (2025-01-15), cost ($1122.00), and warranty (24 months) should be visible in their details.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Snipe-IT web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Snipe-IT application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the required data into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data must be entered into the actual Snipe-IT forms and displayed in Snipe-IT data tables, not in Notepad, a spreadsheet, or a generic text document.

integrity.description: Ensure the records were actually saved in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success flash messages (e.g., 'Asset created successfully') or the records appearing in the persistent list views, rather than just being typed into an unsaved form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating records in Snipe-IT (an IT Asset Management software). The industry context is Higher Education / Biomedical Research, and the occupation is IT Asset Manager. Ensure all records (Supplier: Fisher Scientific, Manufacturer: Keysight Technologies, Category: Lab Instruments, Models: DSOX1204G Oscilloscope & 34465A Digital Multimeter, and Assets LAB-0001 to LAB-0004) are genuinely created within the Snipe-IT web interface.
